narrative:
S. Bloomfield Township has 1,358 registered voters, with 49.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 39.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.8 percentage points.
